message:
ui/tui: finalize modal drill-in UX, keyboard remap safety, and unlimited-limit contracts

Summary:
- Consolidates the remaining FrankenTUI behavior and contract updates into one
  coherent change set covering keyboard input handling, detail-modal navigation,
  incremental result loading state, and snapshot/robot contract synchronization.
- Ensures this surface reflects the new product direction:
  1) unlimited result cap semantics (`max_limit=0` contract),
  2) no token-cost-centric chrome in search snapshots,
  3) reliable modal open/close + in-context navigation flows.

What changed:
- `src/ui/app.rs`
  - Removes residual analytics cost enum wiring from TUI-side view/metric enums.
  - Improves query-term extraction for highlighting:
    - ignores boolean operators,
    - handles quoted phrases,
    - strips wildcard/negation punctuation,
    - deduplicates terms case-insensitively.
  - Adds explicit incremental-search runtime state:
    - generation ids to ignore stale async responses,
    - page-size and backend offset tracking,
    - has-more/in-flight guards for load-more behavior.
  - Strengthens detail-modal drill-in behavior:
    - on Enter from selected hit, opens modal and seeds contextual highlights,
    - supports in-modal hit traversal (Enter / n forward, N backward),
    - first Esc closes modal (without exiting app), subsequent Esc exits as expected.
  - Adds pending-scroll signaling so the messages pane auto-centers active context
    hit after modal open / hit navigation instead of drifting.
  - Adjusts key event mapping to avoid collisions that previously consumed literal
    space input in query editing.
  - Updates help/overlay text and surface hints to match remapped controls.

- `src/ui/shortcuts.rs`
  - Reassigns conflicting shortcuts to modifier-based bindings to preserve raw text
    entry in search input and reduce accidental action triggers.
  - Adds `SURFACE_ANALYTICS` (`Alt+A`) and updates constants/tests accordingly.

- `tests/e2e_tui_smoke_flows.rs`
  - Adds regression coverage for spaced query input (`"hello world"`) followed by
    Enter-driven detail modal open and first-Esc close semantics.
  - Normalizes PTY capture assertions by stripping ANSI/control sequences for more
    stable behavior across terminal render differences.
  - Updates help-overlay open flow to use F1, matching runtime bindings.

- Contract/snapshot updates:
  - `tests/fixtures/cli_contract/capabilities.json`
    - sets `limits.max_limit` to `0` (unlimited sentinel contract).
  - `tests/cli_robot.rs`
    - updates introspection assertions for limit default/limit semantics.
  - TUI snapshots refreshed to reflect:
    - new global surface hint row,
    - updated result metadata badges,
    - removal of token-cost readouts from summary/status bars.

Files:
- src/ui/app.rs
- src/ui/shortcuts.rs
- tests/cli_robot.rs
- tests/e2e_tui_smoke_flows.rs
- tests/fixtures/cli_contract/capabilities.json
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_closed.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_current_match.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_empty_query.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_find_no_matches.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_detail_tabs_messages_active.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_baseline_role_gutters_messages.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_active_filters.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_breakpoint_medium.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_breakpoint_narrow.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_breakpoint_wide.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_structure_default.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_theme_dark.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_theme_high_contrast.snap
- tests/snapshots/cassapp_search_surface_theme_light.snap
